revision.text:
The HTML markup produced by this template includes an [[HCard|hCard microformat]], which makes the person's name [[Parsing|parsable]] by computers, either acting automatically to catalogue articles across Wikipedia or via a browser tool operated by a reader, to (for example) add the subject to an address book. For more information about the use of [[microformat]]s on Wikipedia, please see [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats|the microformat project]].
To include a URL, use {{tl|URL}}.
=== Classes === The hCard in this template uses at least some of these HTML classes:
{{Flatlist| *agent *family-name *fn (required) *given-name *honorific-prefix *honorific-suffix *n *nickname *org *url *vcard }}
'''Please do not rename or remove these classes nor collapse nested elements which use them.'''<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc | |{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | |[[Category:Templates generating hCards]]}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>
[[Category:Templates generating hCards]] [[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
The HTML markup produced by this template includes an [[:en:HCard|hCard microformat]], which makes the person's name [[Parsing|parsable]] by computers, either acting automatically to catalogue articles across Wikipedia or via a browser tool operated by a reader, to (for example) add the subject to an address book. For more information about the use of [[microformat]]s on Wikipedia, please see [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats|the microformat project]].
To include a URL, use {{tl|URL}}.
=== Classes === The hCard in this template uses at least some of these HTML classes:

The HTML markup produced by this template includes an [[:en:HCard|hCard microformat]], which makes the person's name [[:en:Parsing|parsable]] by computers, either acting automatically to catalogue articles across Wikipedia or via a browser tool operated by a reader, to (for example) add the subject to an address book. For more information about the use of [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s on Wikipedia, please see [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats|the microformat project]].
To include a URL, use {{tl|URL}}.
=== Classes === The hCard in this template uses at least some of these HTML classes:

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
The HTML markup produced by this template includes an [[:en:HCard|hCard microformat]], which makes the person's name [[:en:Parsing|parsable]] by computers, either acting automatically to catalogue articles across Wikipedia or via a browser tool operated by a reader, to (for example) add the subject to an address book. For more information about the use of [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s on Wikipedia, please see [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats|the microformat project]].
To include a URL, use {{tl|URL}}.
=== Classes === The hCard in this template uses at least some of these HTML classes:
{{Flatlist| *agent *family-name *fn (required) *given-name *honorific-prefix *honorific-suffix *n *nickname *org *url *vcard }}
'''Please do not rename or remove these classes nor collapse nested elements which use them.'''<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc | |{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | |}} }}</includeonly><noinclude> [[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude>

For more information about the use of [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s on Wikipedia, please see [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats|the microformat project]].
To include a URL, use {{tl|URL}}.
=== Classes === The hCard in this template uses at least some of these HTML classes:

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
The HTML markup produced by this template includes an [[:en:HCard|hCard microformat]], which makes the person's name [[:en:Parsing|parsable]] by computers, either acting automatically to catalogue articles across Wikipedia or via a browser tool operated by a reader, to (for example) add the subject to an address book. For more information about the use of [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s on Wikipedia, please see [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats|the microformat project]].

For more information about the use of [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s on Wikipedia, please see [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats|the microformat project]].
To include a URL, use {{tl|URL}}.
=== Classes === The hCard in this template uses at least some of these HTML classes:
{{Flatlist| *agent *family-name *fn (required) *given-name *honorific-prefix *honorific-suffix *n *nickname *org *url *vcard }}
